g.title: POMPE_QSP
g.text: Pompe Disease (GSDII) — Quantitative Systems Pharmacology Map
GAA deficiency → lysosomal glycogen accumulation → autophagic block → cardiomyopathy/myopathy/respiratory failure
ERT (alglucosidase·avalglucosidase·cipaglucosidase+miglustat) · ADA · M6PR uptake · gene therapy
